content: CRITICAL: Fix training system (remove 'already training' restriction OR allow multiple stats)
CRITICAL: Fix equipment unequip bug (re-equipping same item deletes it)
CRITICAL: Add shields to equipment system (not shown anywhere)
CRITICAL: Sync equipment display (Inventory + Character MUST be identical)
CRITICAL: Implement Shadow Guild/Hideout as dedicated location with features
Fix XP display showing 0/100 and level progression
Add stat bonuses from equipment to Character page display
FINAL: Deploy + comprehensive test of ALL systems
